title: AI BUSINESS BLUEPRINT
subtitle: Your Complete System for AI-Powered Operations
author: Behique

sections.title: NORTH STAR
sections.content: Build AI-powered operations that run 24/7 without burning out your team. Replace repetitive manual work with intelligent automation that scales with your business.

items.label: Mission
items.value: Deploy AI employees across every core business function within 90 days

items.label: Audience
items.value: Solopreneurs, small businesses (1-20 people), freelancers ready to scale

items.label: Revenue
items.value: $500/mo from services -> $5K/mo from productized AI workflows

items.label: Timeline
items.value: Phase 1 (30 days) audit + setup. Phase 2 (60 days) automate + sell.

subsections.title: Intelligence Layer
items: Claude / ChatGPT for reasoning, writing, analysis
GPT-4o-mini for high-volume, low-cost tasks
Local models (Ollama/LM Studio) for private data
Whisper for voice transcription pipelines

subsections.title: Automation Layer
items: n8n (self-hosted) for complex multi-step workflows
Zapier / Make for quick client-facing automations
Python scripts for custom scrapers and processors
Cron jobs + webhooks for scheduled operations

subsections.title: Deployment Layer
items: Railway / Render for bot and API hosting
Vercel for client dashboards and landing pages
Telegram / Slack bots as user interfaces
Notion / Airtable as lightweight databases

subsections.title: Phase 1: Audit (Week 1-2)
items: Map every repeating task in your business
Score each task: time spent, complexity, AI-readiness
Identify top 5 automation candidates by ROI
Document current tools, costs, and pain points

subsections.title: Phase 2: Setup (Week 3-4)
items: Deploy n8n instance and connect core tools
Build first 3 automation workflows end-to-end
Create prompt templates for each AI task
Set up monitoring and error alerting

subsections.title: Phase 3: Automate (Week 5-8)
items: Replace manual processes one at a time
Train team on AI-assisted workflows
Build feedback loops to improve prompt quality
Document SOPs for every automated process

subsections.title: Phase 4: Scale (Week 9-12)
items: Productize your best workflows for clients
Launch AI consulting / done-for-you services
Build recurring revenue from managed automations
Expand to new verticals using proven templates

sections.title: THE FRAMEWORK
sections.content: Think of AI tools as employees. Each one gets a role, clear instructions, defined inputs/outputs, and performance reviews.

items.label: Roles
items.value: Content writer, data analyst, customer support rep, bookkeeper, researcher

items.label: Training
items.value: Prompt engineering = onboarding. Better prompts = better employees.

items.label: Evaluation
items.value: Track accuracy, speed, cost per task. Replace underperformers.

items.label: Oversight
items.value: Human reviews all outputs. AI drafts, humans approve.

sections.title: GLOBAL GUARDRAILS
checklist: Always review AI output before publishing or sending
Never share sensitive client data with public AI models
Maintain your brand voice in all AI-generated content
Human makes all final decisions on strategy and spending
Version control all prompts and templates
Monitor costs weekly to prevent billing surprises
Keep fallback manual processes for critical functions
Audit AI accuracy monthly and retrain prompts as needed

subsections.title: Getting Started
items: OpenAI API docs: platform.openai.com/docs
Anthropic Claude docs: docs.anthropic.com
n8n documentation: docs.n8n.io
Railway deployment: railway.app/docs
